name: nodus-plugin
description: Helper skills, commands, rules, and agents for installing, inspecting, and maintaining Nodus packages.

interface.longDescription: Install, inspect, sync, and review Nodus packages in the current repository using the package content shipped here and the project-scoped Nodus flow.
defaultPrompt: Install a Nodus package for Codex in this repo with `nodus add <package> --adapter codex`.
Inspect this Nodus package before I add it.
Sync this workspace and verify Nodus is healthy with `nodus doctor`.
